response.justification: Bogdan brings 14+ years of fullstack engineering experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure across multiple production roles. The current position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which directly satisfies a differentiating requirement in the job spec. Testing culture is exceptionally strong — TDD is a recurring theme across roles, reinforced by open-source test tooling authorship and workshop facilitation. The primary gap is Nest.js, which is listed as a core stack technology and is absent from the resume entirely; however, the depth of Node.js and TypeScript backend experience suggests it is learnable quickly. Kotlin for backend services is also thin, with Java exposure limited to embedded/robotics contexts rather than JVM service development.
strengths: Production TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple roles with AWS and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) hands-on
Current-role AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work directly matches the AI agent development requirement
Exceptionally strong TDD and testing discipline evidenced by open-source test runners, assertion libraries, and public workshop delivery
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume despite being a named primary stack technology
Kotlin/JVM backend experience is not demonstrated; Java appears only in embedded and robotics contexts
Vitest is not mentioned; testing frameworks cited are custom D-language tools and general TDD practice rather than the specified Jest/Vitest/Playwright stack
